name: Merriam-Webster Dictionary API
description: Access comprehensive dictionary and thesaurus content from Merriam-Webster, including definitions, etymologies, audio pronunciations, synonyms, and antonyms. Includes multiple reference products: Collegiate Dictionary, Learner's Dictionary, Thesaurus, Medical Dictionary, and Spanish-English Dictionary.
